content.en:
"It's time to completely solve the matter of the Star Ancient Domain, it is not of much value to me, and it is not cost-effective to let a clone sit there permanently!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After all, his current conventional combat power can reach the Ninefold Supreme, and the strength of the Star Ancestor is also at this level, although it is a little more powerful than him, it is definitely not too strong.

Therefore, Xingzu is not of much value to him.

Besides, there won't be a lot of treasures on Xingzu's body, so he didn't continue to pick up the wool.

On this day, Ye Tian's Gu Xing Ancestor clone came to the Gu Star Tower.

"Xuchen, you're here!"

Xingzu saw Ye Tian coming and appeared.

"Xingzu, I'm here to say goodbye to you!"

Ye Tian said.

As soon as Xingzu heard Ye Tian's tone, his face suddenly changed.

"Xuchen, what do you mean by this?" Xingzu said coldly, "We have signed a contract. "

"That's right!" Ye Tian nodded, "We did sign a contract between us, but what if this is a special clone?"

"Special clones!"

Xingzu's expression changed drastically.

If it was Ye Tian's special doppelganger who signed with him, then Ye Tian would self-destruct this body, and the contract would not be established, and there would be no way to restrain Ye Tian.

"Who the hell are you?"

Star Ancestor roared.

He now finally understood why Ye Tian had killed the Ten Supreme Beings, and why what he had done was not conducive to the development of the Ancient Star Clan at all.

The reason for all is that Ye Tiannai is a creature from the outside world, who created this clone of the ancient star clan, and sent the clone into the ancient domain of the stars, and has grown to this day.

He hates!

"Damn, why didn't I see that this is a doppelganger?"

Xingzu regretted.

If it was an ordinary doppelganger, he would definitely see it.

But Ye Tian's clone was actually no different from the main body, so Xing Ancestor couldn't see it.

"Xingzu, I told you the reason, and it can be regarded as if you don't have any doubts, I will seal here, and your consciousness can't break the seal again. Moreover, I will take most of the resources of the Ancient Star Clan. "

Ye Tian said.

"Xuchen, if I can get out, I will definitely kill you!"

Star Ancestor roared.

"Xingzu, do you think that when you come out, you will be my opponent?" Ye Tian sneered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to seal this space.

He almost brought out all of his perception of the eternal rules, and arranged an extremely complex prohibition, and the ancient star clan in the outside world couldn't do it even if they wanted to communicate with the star ancestor.

After arranging the prohibition, Ye Tian took away all the treasures accumulated by the Ancient Star Clan over countless years in his own identity, and also entered the forces of the Ancient Star Clan one by one, forcibly taking away the treasures in their treasure houses.

Almost in a short period of time, the Ancient Star Clan was completely ransacked by Ye Tian, and the entire Ancient Star Clan was also in chaos.

Subsequently, Ye Tian copied the body of a first-class invincible person and entered the Star Ancient Domain, bringing back all the resources plundered by the Gu Star Clan's clone.

After that, Ye Tian directly annihilated this clone.

Xuchen's identity will disappear completely.

Inside the Ancient Star Tower.

Xingzu looked at the prohibition that sealed this place, and deeply felt embarrassed.

In addition to the fact that the power of the seal is not very strong, even he feels extremely tricky about the mystery of the seal.

"Xu Chen's control of the Eternal Rules has actually been raised to this level, it is definitely comparable to the Half-Step Eternal Realm, could it be that he is the doppelganger of some half-step Eternal Realm?"

Xingzu was completely desperate.

It is impossible for the Gu Xing Clan to save him, he is afraid that he will not be able to go out for eternity.

---------------------

"The resources of the Ancient Star Clan are okay, but unfortunately they are of little use to me, so let's give them the development of the Terran!"

Ye Tian then sent these resources to the Terran Temple, which would be used as resources for the development of the Terran in the future.

And his main task now is to help his son Ye Xingchen to impact the Supreme Realm, once Ye Xingchen breaks through, the Dark Forbidden Domain can evolve into an eternal heaven and earth, and it can also become the real base camp of the human race.

At that time, he can also return to the Terran base camp and truly defend the Terrans.

Moreover, with its own eternal world, the human race can truly rise.

In addition, Ye Tian also had a goal, which was to create an eternal technique.

A truly top-notch half-step Eternal Technique has mastered not only multiple half-step Eternal Techniques, but also at least one Eternal Technique.

Before, Ye Tian was unable to master the Eternal Technique, not only because of his low cultivation, but more importantly, he did not have a high enough grasp of the Eternal Rules, and he did not know enough about the Eternal Technique.

But now, he has been comprehending the innate eternal rules in the body of the innate eternal life all the time, and his mastery of the eternal rules has reached an unimaginable level, so he has the hope of creating an eternal technique.

This time, Ye Tian was ready to start from the destruction interception point and create an eternal finger technique.

In order to create this finger skill, Ye Tian didn't care about time, and endless years passed.

One Hundred Tribulations!

A Thousand Tribulations!

A robbery!

Ten robbery dollars!

......

I have to say that it is indeed extremely difficult to create an eternal technique, many half-step eternal realms do not know how many thousands of eons it took to create an eternal technique, so Ye Tian naturally could not easily create it.

Finally, in the fifty-sixth Tribulation, Ye Tian created an Eternal Technique-level finger technique.

He called this technique the finger of destruction, which means to destroy everything.

After the creation of this eternal technique, Ye Tian ushered in a transformation, and then it didn't take long for his cultivation to rise to the pinnacle realm of the Fivefold Supreme, and he was only one step away from the Sixfold Supreme.

Some more years passed, and news came from his son Ye Xingchen.

He is about to impact the Supreme Realm.

Under Ye Tian's vigorous cultivation and spurring, Ye Xingchen was also considered to be competitive, and he did not disappoint him, and finally broke through to the peak realm of a first-class invincible, and created a supreme technique that was in line with the ancient astral body.

Now, Ye Xingchen was ready to condense the Eternal Tribulation Body, and once the condensation was successful, he would be able to absorb the origin of the Ancient Star Stone and impact the Supreme Realm.

After a large amount of eternal resources given by Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen successfully condensed the Eternal Tribulation Body.

Then, he began to absorb the Ancient Star Stone Origin to impact the Supreme One.

"It must be successful!"

Ye Xingchen calmed down and said.

He was very aware of his potential, and if it weren't for his father's help, he would not have been able to step into the Supreme Realm in his eternal life, let alone be promoted to the Supreme One with such a solid foundation now.

It was his luck!

So, he couldn't let his father down.

Time passed, and after a long time, the space of Ye Xingchen's retreat transmitted an aura of the Supreme.

Ye Xingchen successfully broke through to the realm of the supreme.

And the Dark Forbidden Realm has also given birth to three supreme beings, who are about to usher in a metamorphosis.
